{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Lady Nakali
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lady Nakali]] lost her leg.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|"It seems they haven't had any volunteers since Lady Nakali lost her leg."<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
